race.comment: ARISTOCRATIC GIRL (7) is nearing a win after placing at her past four starts, including a second most recently over 1200m at this track after she was handy all the way. Ready to break through and should go close. OPETAIA (14) ran a 2.25-lengths third behind the winner fresh at Sunshine Coast. Better for having that run and out in trip could take this. RHETORIC (6) strips fitter after two runs this campaign. Finished third last start over 1000m at Sunshine Coast Poly, an improvement in the first-up effort. In the mix. VIDEO VIXEN (12) form is patchy but showed her better side last start when third over 1200m at Sunshine Coast. Can contest for a place.
